---
title: "AD Microglia Processing GSE174367"
author: "Alexander Bergendorf"
date: "2026-04-07"
output: html_document
---


# Library Import

```{r}
library(Seurat)
#library(mixOmics)
library(tidyverse)
#library(orthogene)
library(dittoSeq)
library(openxlsx)
#library(PCAtools)
library(MASS)
library(glmnet)
library(pROC)

home_dir <- "/mnt/vstor/SOM_PATH_DKB50/members/axb1812/AD_Project_Microglia"

```


## Loading Mouse Data

```{r}
combined <- readRDS(file = paste0(home_dir, "/sc_human_objects/gse174367_final_filtered.RData"))

combined <- subset(combined, subset = summary == "Microglia")
```

```{r}
gc()
```






## Run PCA to isolate human Microglia

```{r}
DefaultAssay(combined) <- "RNA"
combined <- NormalizeData(combined)
combined <- FindVariableFeatures(combined, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 3000)
all.genes <- rownames(combined)
combined <- ScaleData(combined, features = all.genes)
combined <- RunPCA(combined, features = VariableFeatures(object = combined))
```


```{r}
combined <- FindNeighbors(combined, graph.name = "test", dims = 1:5)
combined <- FindClusters(combined, graph.name = "test", resolution = 0.5)
combined <- RunUMAP(combined, graph.name = "test", dims = 1:5)
```






```{r}
p1 <- dittoDimPlot(combined, var = "Diagnosis", reduction = "umap")
ggsave(filename= paste0(home_dir, "/figures/gse174367/microglia_gse174367_umap_microglia_.png"), width = 9, height = 7) # name the file as an EPS

p1 <- dittoDimPlot(combined, "seurat_clusters", do.label = TRUE, legend.show = FALSE, labels.size = 3) 
ggsave(filename= paste0(home_dir, "/figures/gse174367/microglia_gse174367_umap_init.png"), width = 9, height = 7) # name the file as an EPS

```


```{r}
# Visualization of some markers
marker_list <- c("GAD1", "NRGN",
             "ANLN", 
             "VCAN", 
             "CABLES1", "AQP4", 
             "VWF", "FLT1",
             "CSF1R")

# Dot plot of all markers across clusters
p2 <- DotPlot(combined, features = marker_list, assay = "RNA") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev)
ggsave(filename = paste0(home_dir, "/figures/gse174367/microglia_dotplot_markers.png"),
       plot = p2, width = 9, height = 7)
```



```{r}
# Cluster 5 and 6 are all non-microglial cels
combined <- subset(combined, subset = seurat_clusters %in% c(6, 8), invert = TRUE)
```



```{r}
# Save barcodes of good microglial cells for future use
good_microglia <- Cells(combined)
saveRDS(good_microglia, file = paste0(home_dir, "/sc_human_objects/gse174367_good_microglia_barcodes.RData"))
```


```{r}
saveRDS(combined,  paste0(home_dir, "/sc_human_objects/gse174367_microglia_final.RData"))
```


```{r}
combined <- readRDS(paste0(home_dir, "/sc_human_objects/gse174367_microglia_final.RData"))
```

```{r}
table(combined@meta.data$summary, combined@meta.data$SampleID)
```


```{r}
markers <- c("TMEM119", "AIF1", "CX3CR1", "P2RY12", "HEXB", "CSF1R")

for(i in markers){
  p1 <- dittoDimPlot(combined, i, do.label = TRUE, legend.show = FALSE, labels.size = 3) 
  ggsave(filename= paste0(home_dir, "/figures/gse174367/microglia_umap", i, ".png"), width = 9, height = 7) # name the file as an EPS
}
```




# Session Information

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
